variables.notes: R:nc. STD appears split across several debt lines. I selected the unambiguous current debt labels and excluded lease rows. Manual review is needed because 'Liabilities to credit institutions' appears both current and non-current with the exact same label, and 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' may overlap with current borrowings.
